assemble IR · classify nodes · write ir.json
orphan tools · unguarded loops · dangling routers
DIRECT · LOSSY · UNSUPPORTED per construct → feeds reports + LLM
ast.parse · IR coverage · forbidden tokens · required symbols → ACCEPTANCE.md
